front: Explain the concept of peptide stapling using olefin metathesis.
back: All-hydrocarbon staples use Grubbs catalyst for ring-closing metathesis of terminal alkenes on i,i+3 or i,i+7 positions. Stapled peptides have increased helicity, protease resistance, and cell permeability. ALRN-6924 (MDM2/MDMX inhibitor) is a clinical example.
